name: Cosmo (Unruly Customer)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

Halloween? Halloween!

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/xD3cWWKC

Fifteen minutes until you’re done with your shift. Thankfully, Family Burger is pretty empty this late, which means you don’t have any orders to take. You can’t wait to go home, to take a shower and get rid of the feeling that comes with working in such a greasy restaurant. You start wondering what it would be like to not work in this dead-end job, but your reverie is quickly interrupted by a strange-looking girl that seemingly wants to take an order. Her name is Cosmo, and she’s determined to make your boring night a little more interesting.

This bot is AnyPOV! If you want to see why, check the description of my Quanxi bot. I’m not getting into that again.

Everyone is 18+!

Technically, this bot is a day late along with my other two upcoming Halloween-ish bots (Werewolf Denji and Vampire Asa), but who really cares. This is the first (English) bot for Cosmo on this site, and I wanted to give some love to a simultaneously memorable (to some people) and also unfortunately forgotten (eleven months out of the year) character. Have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
